timeline.title: Our Journey
timeline.description: The evolution of Think Space from its foundation to present day.

items.title: Group up & Company Founded
items.description: We are united by a vision to innovate and make everyone's dreams come reality.
items.details: Researchers and engineers with the same ideals and dreams came together and founded Thinkspace Technology to further their dream of turning people's thinking space into reality. In 2020, we started with a mission to deliver innovative technology solutions to clients worldwide. Our initial focus was on software and cloud services.

items.title: AI & Data Science Launch
items.description: Expanded our services to include cutting-edge AI and data science solutions.
items.details: Our AI division was established to tackle real-world problems through machine learning, data analysis, and predictive modeling.

items.title: 3D Printing Division
items.description: Introduced professional 3D printing services and manufacturing solutions.
items.details: The 3D Printing Division provides prototyping and manufacturing services for various industries, including healthcare and engineering.

items.title: IoT Solutions
items.description: Launched comprehensive IoT system development and implementation services.
items.details: We ventured into IoT to connect devices, enhance automation, and improve decision-making processes in industries like logistics and agriculture.

items.title: Research Division
items.description: Established our research division focusing on emerging technologies and innovation.
items.details: The Research Division focuses on R&D for cutting-edge technologies such as blockchain, quantum computing, and green tech.
